aka: Once Upon a Hero(A Zero Hero Telemovie)
英雄往事(零号英雄电视电影）

cast.name: 弗纳塔·洛佩斯 Vernetta Lopez
夏洛特·格雷森 Charlotte Clarke
扎克里·莫萨尔 Zachary Mosalle

trans_title: Once Upon a Hero(A Zero Hero Telemovie)
英雄往事(零号英雄电视电影）
introduction: It's been one year since The Magnificent Heroes saved Singapore from Captain Chaoszzz's evil regime. But things are about to change with the appearance of a new, evil and powerful villain, Doomsday Clock. Equipped with powerful abilities, this mysterious masked villain wreaks havoc across the nation; freezing time, cutting off technology and even breaking Captain Chaoszzz, Pink Piranha and Disgusto out of prison. Over confident and out of shape, the heroes risk humiliation and enlist the help of regional superheroes to save the day. Will our Magnificent Heroes stand their ground to reveal Doomsday Clock's true identity and masterplan, or will they flee leaving evil to reign supreme?
